title: I would like to know if there is an option to have all folders collapsed by default in Monday.com?
excerpt:
When I log in, all folders are expanded, which can be overwhelming. 
I tried to search Monday.com’s search function, but I could not find anything. Monday.com team responded that this functionality is not currently suppo…

posts.author: Clu (Luke McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I log in, all folders are expanded, which can be overwhelming.
I tried to search Monday.com’s search function, but I could not find anything. Monday.com team responded that this functionality is not currently supported. but will forward to development team for possible future feature upgrade.
